title: Quiet run body (v1)
description: The `body` of a §8.2 `quiet` response — a first-class successful no-finding result (spec 9), the shape a host validates as `response.body` on the quiet output port. Records only the semantics needed to stay quiet next time.

reason.description: Why the run was quiet, e.g. 'already-issued', 'no-finding'.

lineageKey.description: Passthrough of the originating §8.1 signal lineage key, when present.
